untranslatable_reason: Below-the-stomach formation is a candlestick pattern that requires multi-bar shape recognition (specific body/wick configuration across multiple candles). The allowed indicators cannot detect or define this specific pattern structure. Pattern detection requires custom pattern recognition logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated the directional logic (price closes downward day after formation) using close vs prev_close, but the pattern identification itself cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. Target regime inferred from 'reversals occur most often within a third of the yearly low' suggests TRENDING_DOWN context. Success rate of 86% in bear markets noted but not encoded as conditions.
